Class Objective

java.lang.Object
nongui.baseentity.Objective
Direct Known Subclasses:
BaronNashor, BlueSentinel, ElderDragon, FreljordianYeti, GreaterMurkWolf, InfernalDrake, RedBrambleback, RiftHerald
public abstract class Objective extends Object
An abstract base class representing an Objective (Boss Monster) in the game. Players must meet requirements and roll dice to defeat them, receiving either a prize upon victory or a punishment upon defeat.

  • Constructor Details

    • Objective

      public Objective()
      Default constructor for Objective. Initializes with dummy data and default target rolls.

    • Objective

      public Objective(String name, String flavorText, int minTargetRoll, int maxTargetRoll)
      Constructs a new Objective with the specified details.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the objective.
      flavorText - The lore or story text.
      minTargetRoll - The minimum dice roll required to win.
      maxTargetRoll - The maximum dice roll limit.

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the string representation of the objective (its name).
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      The name of the objective.

    • grantPrize

      public abstract void grantPrize(Player player)
      Grants a specific prize to the player upon defeating the objective.
      Parameters:
      player - The player who won the challenge.

    • grantPunishment

      public abstract void grantPunishment(Player player)
      Applies a specific punishment to the player upon failing the challenge.
      Parameters:
      player - The player who failed the challenge.

    • canTry

      public boolean canTry(Player player)
      Checks if the player meets the requirements to challenge this objective.
      Parameters:
      player - The player attempting the challenge.
      Returns:
      true if the player can try, false otherwise.

    • tryToComplete

      public boolean tryToComplete(int index, Player player)
      Executes the battle sequence between the player and the objective.
      Parameters:
      index - The index of this objective on the board.
      player - The player attempting to complete the objective.
      Returns:
      true if the battle occurred, false if requirements were not met.
